# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    default: MyVnet
  addressPrefixes:
    type: array
    default: [
      {
        "name": "first",
        "addressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/16"
      }
    ]
  subnetConfigurations:
    type: object
    default:
      web:
        name: Web
        addressPrefix: "10.0.1.0/24"
      app:
        name: App
        addressPrefix: "10.0.2.0/24"
      database:
        name: Database
        addressPrefix: "10.0.3.0/24"
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: '2020-08-01'
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
       AddressPrefixes: "[parameters('addressPrefixes')[copyIndex()].addressPrefix]"
      subnets: 
      - name: '[parameters('subnetConfigurations').web.name]'
        properties:
          addressPrefix: '[parameters('subnetConfigurations').web.addressPrefix]'
      - name: '[parameters('subnetConfigurations').app.name]'
        properties:
          addressPrefix: '[parameters('subnetConfigurations').app.addressPrefix]'
      - name: '[parameters('subnetConfigurations').database.name]'
        properties:
          addressPrefix: '[parameters('subnetConfigurations').database.addressPrefix]'
